_comment: Recollect — Amazon CloudWatch agent config (the §11 OUT-OF-BAND box-health metrics). cloud-init installs the agent (amazon-cloudwatch-agent) and applies this committed file (see deploy/pulumi/user-data.sh: amazon-cloudwatch-agent-ctl -a fetch-config -c file:.../cloudwatch-agent.json). No secrets in it. The agent has the CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy via the instance role and resolves ${aws:InstanceId} itself. FREE-TIER DISCIPLINE: exactly 4 CUSTOM metrics — mem_used_percent, swap_used_percent, and disk_used_percent at the two real mounts (/ and /data) — published to the Recollect/Host namespace every 300s (basic 5-min, no detailed monitoring, no Logs shipping). Pulumi's alarms watch these (recollect-mem-high / -swap-high / -disk-root / -disk-data).
